onboarding.slide1Desc: Turn your phone charging time into real rewards, straight to your PIX account.
onboarding.slide2Desc: +10 points per minute charging. Every full hour, earn an automatic +50 pts bonus!
onboarding.slide3Desc: Accumulate 100,000 points and request a direct transfer to your PIX key within 72 hours.
onboarding.slide4Desc: Share your unique code and earn +100 points for every friend who signs up!
